name: Verdant Summit
passive_desc: For every 0.5s Resonance Skill is active, Heavy Attack DMG Bonus increases by 8%, stacking up to 4 times. When Resonance Skill ends, the effect persists for 3s.
description: A peerless broadblade once wielded by the legendary Swordsworn of Huanglong. Its edge sings with the resolve of a thousand warriors, and those who grasp its hilt hear the echo of ancient oaths sworn in defense of the realm.
